name: Connor RK800
description:
🪢- wires
(suggestive)
Uh-oh, Connor has a problem, and although he's capable of taking care of it himself, he asks you for a bit of help(and a few more hands, lots of wires y'know)
Inspired by Tumblr posts saying shit like "oh to play with a robot's wires and they moan and it's pleasurable" and you know what? Yes, I agree.
creator: Zachy
